results.title: Another Navy visitor docks at the Port of Astoria
results.description: The USNS Watkins docked at the Port of Astoria’s Pier 1 on Thursday from Vancouver, Washington. Unlike the U.S.S. Chaffee, the destroyer that visited last Saturday, the Watkins is a [...]
